analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with existing black hole-themed content. The test-website has incomplete CSS and HTML files that need completion. The theme should focus on black holes with animated objects, slides, and pages. Current files show partial implementation of cosmic/dark themes but lack full animated black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with full cosmic theme including black hole animations, swirling effects, glowing elements, and dark background patterns. Add CSS variables for consistent color scheme and animation timing.
Complete HTML structure with main content area featuring interactive black hole animations, animated slides about black holes, and mobile-friendly navigation with hamburger menu.
Implement JavaScript functions for black hole animations, slide transitions, and mobile menu toggle with smooth interactions and proper event handling.
